Task: Debug an issue

Code:
with mlflow.start_run(run_name="params_optuna_dbscan"):
    mlflow.set_tag("optimization_type", "optuna")
    mlflow.set_tag("model_type", "dbscan")

    study = optuna.create_study(direction='maximize')
    study.optimize(objective, n_trials=15, show_progress_bar=True)

    best_trial = study.best_trial

    mlflow.log_param("best_trial_number", best_trial.number)
    mlflow.log_metric("best_trial_metric", best_trial.value)
    mlflow.log_params({"best_"+k: v for k, v in best_trial.params.items()})

Actual behavior:
optuna crushing

- used optuna to find best params for dbscan
